_comment: The semantic boxes (data). Two independent axes: ROLE = what the content is; WEIGHT = how much visual salience it earns. Since v0.9.7 the box is a BAR-LESS filled card (user study on a real 83-page build: the side bar read as clutter): the FILL carries the weight ladder — one ink-blue family whose fill weakens as weight drops (W1 strongest -> W5 near-neutral); 'warn' (W4) is the ONE warm fill because a warning's job is to interrupt reading; W5 is neutral gray. Title color still names the role. gen-css.mjs emits .box-<role> background + title color; base.css defines per-weight structure (radius, title size). Budget unchanged: prose is default, ~1 box/chapter, box share < 10%. Fields: weight, title=bold title TEXT color, body=full card fill.
